🌸 Pretty Petals

Terms & Conditions

Last updated: May 31, 2026

Orders

All orders are custom and made to order. By submitting an order request through prttypetals.com, you are requesting a custom floral arrangement. Orders are not confirmed until Pretty Petals contacts you to confirm availability and pricing.

Payments

A 50% deposit is required to confirm your order. The remaining balance is due upon completion. All payments are processed securely through Stripe. Deposits are non-refundable once work has begun on your arrangement.

SMS Communications

By providing your phone number, you consent to receive SMS messages from Pretty Petals including order confirmations, status updates, and payment links. Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP at any time to opt out.

Cancellations

Cancellations must be made at least 48 hours before the requested date. Deposits may be forfeited for late cancellations.

Delivery

Pretty Petals offers delivery within the Houston, TX area. Delivery fees may apply. Pickup is also available at no additional charge.

Contact

For questions, contact us at orders@prttypetals.com or Instagram @prttypetalss.

© 2026 Pretty Petals · Houston, TX
